diagrams.title: BGP State Machine
diagrams.description: Shows the six states a BGP neighbor goes through during session establishment
diagrams.purpose: Understanding BGP session establishment and troubleshooting neighbor issues

diagrams.title: iBGP vs eBGP Topology
diagrams.description: Shows two autonomous systems (AS 100 and AS 200) with eBGP between them and iBGP within each AS
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how BGP behaves differently for internal and external peers

diagrams.title: BGP Path Selection Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential decision process BGP uses to select best path
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how BGP chooses between multiple routes to same destination

diagrams.title: Route Reflection Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how route reflectors eliminate full mesh requirement in iBGP
diagrams.purpose: Understanding BGP scalability solutions for large networks
